{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's Bitget?" %}

{% trans 'Bitget is a leading global cryptocurrency exchange that specializes in derivatives trading. The platform offers a comprehensive suite of trading services including:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot trading with competitive fees' %}
  • {% trans 'Futures trading with up to 125x leverage' %}
  • {% trans 'Advanced trading features and tools' %}
  • {% trans 'Copy trading functionality' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with Bitget?' %}

{% trans 'With Bitget, you can trade the following:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot Trading' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units. Your account must have sufficient base and quote assets to trade in both directions.' %}
  • {% trans "USDT-M Futures" %}: {% trans "Quantity is measured in base asset units. Margin mode should be set to" %} {% trans "Isolated" %}{% trans ", using USDT as the margin coin. Leverage can be adjusted directly on the exchange." %}
  • {% trans "COIN-M Futures" %}: {% trans "Quantity is measured in base asset units. Margin mode should be set to" %} {% trans "Isolated" %}{% trans ", using USDE as the margin coin. Leverage can be adjusted on the exchange." %}
  • {% trans "USDC-M Futures" %}: {% trans "Quantity is measured in base asset units. Margin mode should be set to" %} {% trans "Isolated" %}{% trans ", using USDC as the margin coin. Leverage can be adjusted on the exchange." %}

{% trans 'USDT-M, COIN-M, and USDC-M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Hedge Mode can be enabled from the exchange platform if you want to use dual-side trading; otherwise, the account will operate in One-Way Mode.' %}

{% trans 'API Key Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'follow the steps below to configure your API Keys.' %}

{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning="Never share your API keys with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials." %}

1 {% trans 'Create a Bitget Account' %}

{% trans 'If you don’t already have a Bitget account, please sign up' %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Navigate to API Keys' %}

  1. {% trans 'Log in to your Bitget account.' %}
  2. {% trans 'Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner.' %}
  3. {% trans 'Select "API Keys" from the dropdown menu.' %}

3 {% trans 'Create API Key' %}

  1. {% trans 'Click "Create API Key"' %}
  2. {% trans 'Choose "System generated"' %}
  3. {% trans 'Give your API key a descriptive name in the Note.' %}
  4. {% trans 'Set a Passphrase.' %}

4 {% trans 'Configure Security Settings' %}

  1. {% trans 'Under "Permissions" select "Read-write"' %}
  2. {% trans 'Under "Permission Type" tick "Name"' %}
  3. {% trans "Scroll down and add our server's IP address:" %} {{server_ip}}
  4. {% trans 'Click "Next" to get your API Keys.' %}

{% trans 'IMPORTANT: Ensure you copy your secret key before clicking Confirm.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your API keys, return to our platform's Automate section and use them to link your Binance account with our automation system. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}
